title: 雪趣九连拍
author: @hellokaton
prompt: 创建一个 3×3 的俏皮冬季人像九宫格，所有九帧均使用附件图片中的同一张脸。每帧呈现不同表情、发型与服装——滑稽、尴尬、欢乐、无聊、顽皮、夸张。整体氛围童真、即兴、不完美，像一场只为好玩的创意冬季拍摄。背景为纯色冬季色调（冷蓝、灰、米白、柔 beige）。造型在各帧间变化：凌乱针织帽、围巾、耳罩、 oversized 大衣、毛绒毛衣、层叠冬季纹理、搞怪眼镜、夸张起床发、被雪微微打湿的头发。部分帧包含吐舌头、咧嘴大笑、惊讶脸、假装严肃、被冷到眯眼。布光为柔和工作室冷中性调，可见颗粒，轻微纹理，无磨皮。九宫格整体协调却刻意混乱俏皮——冬季情绪但无节日符号。所有 9 帧中脸部必须 100% 完全相同。
prompt_en: Create a 3x3 grid of playful winter portraits featuring the person from the attached image in all nine frames. Each frame shows a different expression, hairstyle, and outfit — funny, awkward, joyful, bored, mischievous, over-the-top.  The vibe is childlike, spontaneous, and imperfect, like a creative winter photoshoot done just for fun. Solid winter-toned backgrounds (cool blue, grey, off-white, muted beige). Styling varies between frames: messy beanies, scarves, ear warmers, oversized coats, fuzzy sweaters, layered winter textures, quirky glasses, exaggerated bed-hair, slightly wet hair from snow. Some frames include tongue out, wide smile, surprised face, mock-serious look, squinting from cold. Lighting is soft studio with a cool-neutral tone, visible grain, slight texture, no polish. The grid feels cohesive but intentionally chaotic and playful — winter mood without holiday symbolism. The face must remain 100% identical in all 9 frames.

title: 斯塔克工业钢铁侠战衣的演变
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt:
角色与主题：一幅名为“斯塔克工业钢铁侠战衣的演变”的大型百科全书式16:9 3D信息图海报。视觉风格融合了博物馆级别的产品摄影和复杂的技术工程蓝图，呈现出高端质感。

英雄阵容（时间线核心）：完整呈现10款钢铁侠战甲的历史版本，按时间顺序排列，从洞穴中锻造的粗糙笨重的Mark I原型到线条流畅、尖端科技的Mark LXXXV纳米技术型号，应有尽有。它们被精确地排列在中央水平延伸的发光全息测量标尺底座上。渲染：超逼真3D，8K分辨率。着重展现纹理的演变：早期Mark I粗糙的焊接废金属、厚重的铁质和裸露的电线，与Mk 50和Mk 85等现代版本光洁如新、高度抛光的红色和金色镀层以及流畅的纳米技术表面形成鲜明对比。

品牌氛围（画布）：背景：深邃浓郁的热棒红和金属金色纹理背景，宛如装甲板表面。其上叠加了多层低透明度的水印，包括斯塔克工业的复古专利图纸、托尼·斯塔克的手写工程笔记（带有咖啡渍）以及与复仇者联盟历史相关的报纸剪报。标题：醒目的高对比度“STARK INDUSTRIES”标志位于顶部中央，搭配粗体标题。

“超密集”信息层（PUNCH 风格）：布局中充斥着组织有序的信息（营造出一种“数据美学”的外观）：

密集的注释网络：数百条细细的白色和青色线条将特定组件（例如，弧形反应堆、手掌中的反重力发射器、铰接式头盔面罩、微型导弹舱、飞行稳定器）连接到漂浮在体积空间中的紧凑文本块、能量输出图表和数据表。

上下文区域：“时代模块”漂浮在战衣上方，代表不同的阶段（例如，“阿富汗逃亡”、“复仇者联盟计划”、“奥创进攻”、“无限战争纳米科技”），并带有图标标记。

放大插片：散落在空白处的圆形“放大”镜头，显示纹理细节的极端宏观特写，例如 Mark I 的粗糙焊接、Mark III 的机械关节铰接以及 Mark LXXXV 的流体纳米颗粒组装。

技术规格条：最底部的结构化数据栏，列出精确的规格（型号、重量（吨/千克）、电源类型、生产年份、主要材料代码）。

技术规格：Octane渲染，虚幻引擎5美学，编辑布局，信息设计杰作，电影级体积光照，清晰对焦，专业调色，大片海报氛围。--ar 16:9 --v 6.0 --stylize 350
prompt_en:
Role & Subject: A massive, encyclopedic 16:9 3D infographic poster titled "THE EVOLUTION OF STARK INDUSTRIES IRON MAN SUITS". The visual style is a high-end fusion of museum-grade product photography and complex technical engineering blueprints.

The Hero Lineup (Chronological Core): A complete, linear chronological lineup of 10 historical versions of Iron Man Armors, ranging from the crude, bulky Mark I prototype forged in a cave to the sleek, bleeding-edge Mark LXXXV nanotechnology model. They are arranged with precision on a glowing holographic measurement scale/ruler base running horizontally across the center. Rendering: Hyper-realistic 3D, 8k resolution. Emphasis on the evolution of textures: showing the aging of early crude welded scrap metal, heavy iron, and exposed wiring of the Mk I vs. the pristine, highly-polished hot-rod red and gold plating, and fluid nanotech finish of modern versions like the Mk 50 and Mk 85.

Brand Atmosphere (The Canvas): Background: A deep, rich Hot Rod Red and metallic Gold textured background, resembling an armored plating surface. It is heavily layered with low-opacity watermarks of vintage Stark Industries patent drawings, handwritten engineering notes by Tony Stark (with coffee stains), and newspaper clippings related to the Avengers' history. Header: A prominent, high-contrast STARK INDUSTRIES logo displayed at the top center, with a bold typography title.

The "Hyper-Dense" Information Layer (The PUNCH Style): The layout is overwhelmed with organized information (creating a "Data aesthetics" look):

Dense Annotation Network: Hundreds of fine white and cyan hairlines connecting specific components (e.g., Arc Reactors, Repulsor Transmitters in palms, Articulated Helmet Faceplates, Micro-missile Compartments, Flight Stabilizers) to compact text blocks, energy output charts, and data tables floating in the volumetric space.

Contextual Zones: "Era Modules" floating above the suits, representing different phases (e.g., "AFGHANISTAN ESCAPE," "THE AVENGERS INITIATIVE," "ULTRON OFFENSIVE," "INFINITY WAR NANO-TECH") with iconographic markers.

Magnifying Inserts: Circular "Zoom-in" lenses scattered in empty spaces, showing extreme macro close-ups of texture details like the crude welding on Mark I, the mechanical joint articulation of Mark III, and the fluid nano-particle assembly of Mark LXXXV.

Tech Specs Strip: A structured data bar at the very bottom listing precise specifications (Model Number, Weight in tons/kg, Power Source Type, Year of Creation, Primary Material Code).

Technical Specs: Octane render, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, editorial layout, information design masterpiece, cinematic volumetric lighting, sharp focus, professional color grading, blockbuster movie poster vibe. --ar 16:9 --v 6.0 --stylize 350

title: 圣诞礼物派送活动公告
author: lucas
prompt: 这份通知韩国人能看懂。你能否解读一下？如果可以解读，请直接在原图上进行标注，并写下解读后的关键词或短语。对于那些作为关键点的隐晦表达部分，请圈出来并在旁边添加你的标注。
prompt_en: 이 공지는 한국인이 이해할 수 있습니다. 혹시 이걸 해석 할 수 있어요? 그리고 만약 해석 가능하다면 원본 이미지 위에 첨삭해서 해석한 키워드나 간략한 문장들을 적어줄 수 있어요? 일종의 암호화된 표현들 중에 포인트가 될 만한 부분은 동그라미 쳐주고, 그 옆에 첨삭해주면

title: 品牌标志造型的奢华快闪店
author: ΛRMIN | AI
prompt: 一个豪华快闪店售货亭的 3D 等距渲染图，其形状与 {"brand name and logo shape" "[BRAND_NAME_AND_LOGO_SHAPE]"} 完全一致。该建筑是品牌标志符号的厚实 3D 挤压造型，由高端抛光建筑材料构成，呈光泽的 {"brand color" "[BRAND_COLOR]"}，并带有微妙的拉丝金属点缀。纤细、发光的霓虹 LED 灯带勾勒出标志形状的整个外部轮廓和边缘。大型无缝博物馆级玻璃窗展示了精心设计的内部空间。内部，定制货架展示着 {"product type" "[PRODUCT_TYPE]"}，并配有集成微型 LED 照明。戏剧性的高端工作室照明营造出柔和的阴影和高光，强调纹理和形式。背景是简洁、中性的画廊。超逼真，8k 分辨率，高度详细，Octane 渲染质量，奢华设计美学。
prompt_en: 3D isometric render of a luxury pop-up shop kiosk shaped exactly like the {"brand name and logo shape" "[BRAND_NAME_AND_LOGO_SHAPE]"}. The architecture is a thick 3D extrusion of the logo symbol, constructed from high-end polished architectural materials in glossy {"brand color" "[BRAND_COLOR]"} with subtle brushed metal accents. Thin, glowing neon LED strips trace the entire outer silhouette and edges of the logo shape. Large, seamless museum-grade glass windows showcase a meticulously detailed interior. Inside, bespoke shelves present {"product type" "[PRODUCT_TYPE]"} with integrated micro-LED lighting. Dramatic high-end studio lighting creates soft shadows and highlights, emphasizing textures and form. Set against a clean, neutral gallery background. Ultra-photorealistic, 8k resolution, highly detailed, octane render quality, luxury design aesthetic.

title: 雪林超写实冬日时尚人像摄影

title: 圣诞魔法剧组自拍花絮
author: Özge Döner
prompt_en:
{
  "request_metadata": { "tool": "NanoBananaPro", "task_type": "ultra_photoreal_bts_selfie", "quality_preset": "ultra", "aspect_ratio": "16:9" },
  "references": {
    "character_reference_image": { "slot": 1, "purpose": "MAIN_SUBJECT_IDENTITY_LOCK", "strict_identity_lock": true },
    "support_character_A_reference": { "slot": 2, "purpose": "HARRY_LOOK_LOCK", "required": false },
    "support_character_B_reference": { "slot": 3, "purpose": "HERMIONE_LOOK_LOCK", "required": false },
    "pose_reference_image": { "required": false, "purpose": "SAME_POSE_SAME_FRAMING" }
  },
  "hard_constraints": [
    "EXACTLY 3 subjects: main reference person + Harry + Hermione. Both must appear and be clearly recognizable via wardrobe/props.",
    "Same couch selfie pose; NO device; flawless anatomy.",
    "Holiday: Santa hats + a themed tree matching wizard-school aesthetic (candles, books, star ornaments) with no readable text or house names.",
    "BTS gear visible (boom mic, camera rig, lights, cables, crew edges)."
  ],
  "camera": { "camera_body": "ARRI_ALEXA_Mini_LF_style", "lens": "Zeiss_Supreme_Prime_24mm", "aperture": "f/2.8", "white_balance": "4300K", "notes": ["warm practicals", "soft haze", "prepared by Ozge Doner", "for Bagel Labs"] },
  "prompt": { "scene_summary": "Ultra-photoreal BTS couch selfie on a wizard-school common-room soundstage. Main reference person seated on couch taking a natural selfie; arm outstretched; NO device visible. Harry and Hermione leaning close near couch between takes. Set: books, candles, magical props (no text). Holiday: themed tree with wizardy ornaments, floating-candle style decor (practical effects), no readable symbols. BTS: boom mic, camera rig, lights, cables, crew edges." },
  "negative_prompt": ["missing character", "extra people", "phone", "deformed hands", "extra fingers", "text", "logo", "watermark"]

author: @key_alvesl

title: 精准复刻人脸的水墨融合艺术肖像
author: Gagan Singh
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "使用上传的参考图片，**100% 保留**该女性的**面部特征、身份、年龄、肤色和表情**。请勿改变面部结构或比例。创作一幅**融合了水墨和水彩的艺术插画**，面部特征需逼真。面部以柔和的水彩色调呈现，而轮廓、眼睛、发丝和衣物边缘则使用富有表现力的黑色墨线勾勒。发型需与参考图片完全一致，松散自然，带有零星的飞发。服装：受参考图片启发的传统或优雅服饰，以柔和的水彩色调呈现。背景：抽象的水墨飞溅和水彩晕染，留有受控的负空间和有机的纸张纹理。构图略微偏离中心，以营造艺术编辑感。可见手绘草图线条、流畅的墨迹、分层的水彩晕染、高细节、博物馆品质的插画。",
  "negative_prompt": "模糊、低质量、变形、多余肢体、解剖结构错误、水印、文字叠加、动漫、卡通、照片级真实感、过曝、欠曝、丑陋的面部、糟糕的手部、面部改变、身份改变、平面色彩、数字塑料感",
  "parameters": {
    "steps": 50,
    "cfg_scale": 7.0,
    "sampler": "Euler a or DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "strength": 0.52,
    "noise": 0.28,
    "width": 832,
    "height": 1216,
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "usage_instructions": "在 img2img 或参考模式下上传您的图片。将强度保持在 0.5–0.55 左右，以确保**精确匹配面部**，同时应用水墨水彩艺术风格。仅在需要背景变化时略微增加强度。"
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded reference image to **preserve 100% of the facial features, identity, age, skin tone, and expression** of the woman. Do not alter facial structure or proportions. Create a **fine-art ink and watercolor fusion illustration** with realistic facial likeness. The face is rendered with soft watercolor tones, while contours, eyes, hair strands, and fabric edges are defined using expressive black ink linework. Hair follows the exact reference, loosely styled with natural flyaway strands. Clothing: traditional or elegant attire inspired by the reference, rendered in muted watercolor shades. Background: abstract ink splashes and watercolor blooms, with controlled negative space and organic paper texture. Composition slightly off-center for an artistic editorial feel. Visible hand-drawn sketch lines, flowing ink strokes, layered watercolor washes, high-detail, museum-quality illustration.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text overlay, anime, cartoon, photorealistic, overexposed, underexposed, ugly face, bad hands, face altered, identity changed, flat colors, digital plastic look",
  "parameters": {
    "steps": 50,
    "cfg_scale": 7.0,
    "sampler": "Euler a or DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "strength": 0.52,
    "noise": 0.28,
    "width": 832,
    "height": 1216,
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "usage_instructions": "Upload your image in img2img or reference mode. Keep strength around 0.5–0.55 to ensure **exact face matching** while applying ink-and-watercolor artistic style. Increase slightly only for background variation."
}

title: 首尔乐天世界塔地标特写
author: SETI Park
prompt: “绘制一幅位于北纬 37° 30' 40.4424''、东经 127° 5' 52.9080'' 的图像。请专注于某个地标，而不是随机的场景。”
prompt_en:
이번에는 Nano Banana Pro로 롯데 월드타워를 그려봤습니다.
다만 좌표만 입력하면 주변에 있는 풍경을 랜덤하게 그려주는 것 같아서 프롬프트에 랜드마크에 집중하라는 문구를 추가했더니 잘 작동하는 것 같네요. 😁
“Create an image of 37° 30' 40.4424'' N and 127° 5' 52.9080'' E. Focus on a landmark, not a random scene”

title: 黄甲重装机甲立废墟，持锤盾，末日黄昏静立。
author: はると@AIクリエイター
prompt:
逼真的工业军事人形机甲，
重型装甲，庞大比例，低重心。
硬表面机械建模，真实的工程细节。

巨大的 {argument name="mech color" default="yellow"} 装甲机甲，带有严重的战斗损伤：
油漆剥落和开裂，划痕，凹痕，裂缝，
裸露的金属边缘，油污，灰尘，锈迹，
风化的钢铁和工业金属纹理。

极宽的肩膀，粗壮的腿，
小头部嵌入躯干。
右手握着一把大型工业锤形武器。
左臂集成重型盾牌状装甲。

后末日废墟城市环境，
倒塌的建筑物，瓦砾遍布的街道。
电影般的戏剧性日落天空，
温暖的橙色光线与冰冷的金属装甲形成对比。
真实的全局照明，高对比度光照。

全身镜头，静态强劲姿态，
战后平静的氛围，
黑暗粗犷的科幻现实主义。

负面提示：
动漫，动漫风格机甲，漫画，插画，
程式化设计，夸张的比例，
干净闪亮的装甲，玩具般的塑料，
纤细或敏捷的身体，
英雄姿势，动作姿势，动态运动，
能量效果，发光部件，奇幻元素，
柔和的灯光，彩色柔和色调，
低细节，模糊图像
prompt_en:
Photorealistic industrial military humanoid mech,
heavy armored, bulky proportions, low center of gravity.
Hard surface mechanical modeling, realistic engineering details.

Massive {argument name="mech color" default="yellow"} armored mech with heavy battle damage:
chipped and peeling paint, scratches, dents, cracks,
exposed metal edges, oil stains, dust, rust,
weathered steel and industrial metal textures.

Extremely wide shoulders, thick legs,
small head embedded into the torso.
Right hand holding a large industrial hammer weapon.
Left arm integrated with a heavy shield-like armor.

Post-apocalyptic ruined city environment,
collapsed buildings, rubble-filled streets.
Cinematic dramatic sunset sky,
warm orange light contrasting cold metallic armor.
Realistic global illumination, high contrast lighting.

Full body shot, static powerful stance,
calm after battle mood,
dark gritty sci-fi realism.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
anime, anime-style mecha, manga, illustration,
stylized design, exaggerated proportions,
clean shiny armor, toy-like plastic,
slim or agile body,
hero pose, action pose, dynamic motion,
energy effects, glowing parts, fantasy elements,
soft lighting, colorful pastel tone,
low detail, blurry image

title: 高定光影男装写真：黑高领配棕色灯芯绒裤，切尔西靴，窗影斑驳，
author: (fan) 𝐆
prompt: 一位留着精心修剪的胡须和飞机头（pompadour）发型的男士，身着黑色高领毛衣、卷边棕色灯芯绒长裤和锃亮的黑色切尔西靴，坐在一张黑色金属吧凳上，呈现出时尚电影般的肖像。背景是一个极简主义工作室，白色地板，配有一个大型米色背景布。戏剧性的黄金时段阳光倾泻而入，在他身后的墙壁上投射出独特的“明暗对比”（chiaroscuro）矩形窗格光影图案。8k 分辨率，使用 {"lens type" "35mm"} 镜头拍摄，暖色调，优雅而富有情调的氛围。
prompt_en: A high-fashion cinematic portrait of a man with a groomed beard and pompadour hairstyle, sitting on a black metal barstool. He is wearing a black turtleneck, brown corduroy trousers with rolled cuffs, and polished black leather Chelsea boots. The background is a minimalist studio with a white floor and a large tan-colored backdrop. Dramatic golden hour sunlight streams in, creating a distinct "chiaroscuro" rectangular window-pane light pattern on the wall behind him. 8k resolution, shot on 35mm lens, warm color palette, elegant and moody atmosphere.

title: 光辉的肖像——光与细节的完美融合
author: ShreyaYadav___
prompt: 这是一幅高度详细的8K数字插图，描绘的是一个人的特写镜头（与眼睛平行的视角），人物正面朝向观众，背景为纯白色。画面构图居中，主要展示了人物的上半身。人物的头发浓密、颜色较深且呈卷曲状，每一缕头发都清晰可见，整体呈现出一种时尚而略带凌乱的美感。他们佩戴着一副黑色镜框的眼镜。整体视觉风格以灰度色调为皮肤基调，搭配一件深色条纹T恤；同时，画面中还融入了多种鲜艳的色彩（红色、橙色、黄色、绿色、蓝色和紫色），这些色彩仿佛被绘制或投射在人物的面部、颈部和肩部上。这种风格化的、具有电影质感的灯光效果营造出了强烈的对比度，突出了人物的轮廓，并通过鲜明的色彩与精细的纹理呈现出了独特的视觉效果。人物的眼睛呈现出红棕色的色调。整幅作品线条清晰、结构严谨，尤其是在头发和眼镜的细节处理上非常精致，从而打造出一幅视觉冲击力强的现代肖像画，巧妙融合了单色与霓虹色彩的元素。该图片中的面部图像仅供参考使用。
prompt_en: A highly detailed 8k digital illustration of a person, presented as a close-up, eye-level headshot, facing directly forward against a clean white background. The composition is centered, capturing the upper torso. The subject features voluminous, dark, curly hair with defined strands and a stylishly messy texture. They wear distinct black-framed glasses.The overall aesthetic combines a grayscale base for the skin and a dark, ribbed t-shirt with dynamic, vibrant splashes of multi-colored light, including reds, oranges, yellows, greens, blues, and purples, which appear as if painted or projected onto the face, neck, and shoulders. This stylized, cinematic lighting creates sharp contrasts and a graphic novel aesthetic, emphasizing contours with bold color accents and highly detailed textures. The eyes have a reddish-brown hue. The artwork exhibits sharp lines, clean vectors, and a high level of detail in the hair and glasses, creating a visually striking, modern portrait with a unique blend of monochrome and neon color. uploaded face as reference

title: 超现实主义女性肖像，红黑配色，蝶翼妆容
author: BMX
prompt: 超现实肖像摄影，平视视角，苍白的人形女性，头部有巨大的飞蛾翅膀，红色圆形眼妆，红色纹理夹克，黑色纽扣和白色衣领，一动不动地站立，眼神专注，红色复古花卉壁纸墙，墙上挂着一个空置的华丽金色画框，充满活力的 {"color palette" "red and black"} 色调，柔和弥漫的影棚灯光和诡异的氛围，超现实纹理和对称性，柯达 Ektar 100 + 85mm 短焦远摄镜头。
prompt_en: Surreal portrait photography, eye level, pale humanoid female with large moth wings on head and red circular eye makeup, red textured jacket with black buttons and white collar, standing motionless with intense gaze, red vintage floral wallpaper wall with empty ornate gold frame, vibrant {"color palette" "red and black"} palette, soft diffuse studio lighting and eerie atmosphere, hyper realistic textures and symmetry, Kodak Ektar 100 + 85mm Short Telephoto lens.

title: 时空桥梁：文明演进之路
author: Gadgetify
prompt: 以下是一个示例提示：一个电影般的镜头，展示一座蜿蜒延伸至远处的桥梁。这座桥梁的建造风格随着其长度的变化而自然过渡：最初采用罗马式石料建造，随后变为中世纪的吊桥，接着是维多利亚时代的铁架结构，最后采用未来主义的复合材料。每个部分都呈现出与该时代相符的旅行者形象以及相应的风化痕迹。清晨的薄雾笼罩着下方的山谷，柔和的光线穿透云层洒在桥面上。画面分辨率要求为 8K。
prompt_en:
New Nano Banana Pro prompt structure I am working on for these "evolution" style ideas.
Here is one prompt: A cinematic shot of a single, winding bridge stretching into the distance. The architecture transitions seamlessly along its length: starting as Roman stone, becoming a medieval drawbridge, then a Victorian iron truss, and finally a futuristic composite material. Each section has era-appropriate travelers and weathering. Morning mist fills the valley below, with soft light breaking through clouds. 8K.

title: 一个令人着迷的“自我多元宇宙”
author: ShreyaYadav___
prompt:
{
  "prompt": "这是一幅超写实的23岁女性的全身写真。她的发型与参考图片完全一致，化着自然妆容，目光严肃而直视镜头。她穿着一件白色和天蓝色的拼接连帽衫、黑色高腰裤（或黑色紧身裤/牛仔裤，以展现女性柔美身材），以及一双白色的彪马运动鞋。",
  "style_and_pose": "她优雅地坐在一个洁白无瑕的平台上。",
  "creative_concept": "有多个穿着相同服装的微型人物与她互动：一个站在她的头上，两个坐在她的肩膀上，一个坐在她的手掌中，一个爬上她的腿，还有三个在平台附近走动。所有微型人物都必须保持相同的严肃表情，并且与原人物一模一样。",
  "lighting_and_environment": "背景为无缝的白色摄影棚，使用高端时尚灯光，画面细节丰富、极具写实感。",
  "constraints": "面部特征必须与提供的参考图片完全一致；发型也必须与参考图片完全相同。",
  "signature": "Shreya Yadav"
}
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "An ultra-realistic, full-body studio portrait of a 23-year-old woman. She has dark hair styled exactly as in the reference image and wears natural makeup with a serious, direct gaze into the camera. She is wearing a white and Skyblue color-block cropped hoodie, black high-waisted pants (or black leggings/jeans for a feminine fit), and white Puma athletic shoes.",
  "style_and_pose": "She is seated gracefully on a pristine white platform.",
  "creative_concept": "Multiple miniature versions of herself in the identical outfit are interacting with her: one perched on her head, two sitting on her shoulders, one seated in her open palm, one climbing her leg, and three walking nearby on the platform. All miniature figures must have the same serious expression and perfect likeness.",
  "lighting_and_environment": "Seamless white studio background, high-end fashion lighting, ultra-detailed, photorealistic.",
  "constraints": "Facial likeness must be 100% accurate to the provided reference image. Hair style must be 100% accurate to the provided reference image.",
  "signature": "Shreya Yadav"
}

title: 搞怪涂鸦创意生成器
author: an303042
prompt: 一幅关于 {"subject" "戴着小帽子的猫"} 的搞怪涂鸦
prompt_en: A silly doodle of a {"subject" "cat wearing a tiny hat"}

title: 夜街高角度街拍：少女独站便利店前，手持咖啡，随性自然。
author: K
prompt:
高角度抓拍夜间街头时尚照片，从街对面高层向下拍摄。
一名年轻女子（{"subject identity" "face photo reference"}）独自站在一家便利店入口附近，略微偏离中心。全身可见，留有开放的负空间。
她身穿白色 T 恤、水洗蓝色牛仔夹克、深色直筒牛仔裤和白色帆布运动鞋。一个小手提包挂在她的一个肩膀上。头发散开或低扎，略显凌乱。
明亮的便利店灯光洒落在人行道上，形成柔和的反光。玻璃门映出模糊的室内货架和海报。
她静静地站了一会儿，一只手拿着一个白色外带咖啡杯，另一只手调整着手提包的肩带。
她随意地向上看了一眼，没有察觉到相机。
冷荧光灯与暖街灯光线交织。
使用 Canon AE-1 胶片拍摄，抓拍街头社论风格。
轻微去饱和，细腻胶片颗粒。
主体清晰，背景柔和虚化。
无其他人。无可读文本。
宽高比 4:5。
prompt_en:
High-angle candid night street fashion photograph, shot from an upper floor across the street, looking downward.
A young woman ({"subject identity" "face photo reference"}) stands alone near a minimarket entrance, slightly off-center. Full body visible with open negative space.
She wears a white T-shirt, a washed blue denim jacket, dark straight-leg jeans, and white canvas sneakers. A small tote bag hangs from one shoulder. Hair loose or tied low, slightly messy.
Bright minimarket lighting spills onto the pavement, creating soft reflections. Glass doors show blurred interior shelves and posters.
She stands still for a moment, holding a white takeaway coffee cup while the other hand adjusts her tote bag strap.
She glances upward casually, unaware of the camera.
Cool fluorescent light mixed with warm street lighting.
Shot on Canon AE-1 film, candid street editorial mood.
Slight desaturation, fine film grain.
Sharp subject, gently softened background.
No other people. No readable text.
Aspect ratio 4:5.

title: 蓝箱双人搞怪四格照
author: Sudee🥀

title: 四格拼图：同脸不同表情的少女写真
author: yusra.

title: 红色警戒微缩战场模型
author: @ttmouse
prompt: 红色警戒A：这是一个基于电子游戏《[在此插入游戏名称]》的高度详细3D微缩场景的45°等轴测视图。该微缩模型以中心对称的方式构建，其中密集地包含了《[在此插入游戏名称]》中最具标志性、最容易辨认的建筑、单位、角色和环境元素。该场景必须展示多种不同的元素，以代表不同的阵营、关键的游戏机制或令人难忘的关卡，从而最大限度地唤起玩家的怀旧情感。请确保模型的建筑细节……
prompt_en: 红色警戒 A 45° isometric view of a highly detailed 3D miniature diorama scene based on the video game '[INSERT GAME NAME HERE]'. The diorama block is centered and densely packed with the most iconic and instantly recognizable structures, units, characters, and environmental features specific to '[INSERT GAME NAME HERE]'. The scene must showcase a wide variety of distinct elements representing different factions, key gameplay mechanics, or memorable levels to maximize nostalgia. Ensure the architectu...

title: 艺术家为女子绘制星空脸绘的浪漫肖像
author: ShaHid WaNii
prompt:
超写实电影级情侣肖像，4:5 纵向构图。
女子身穿 {"woman's dress color" "淡蓝色"} 复古泡泡袖连衣裙，留着深色波浪长发，化着自然妆容，戴着小金圈耳环，手捧一大束明亮的黄色向日葵。
右脸颊和太阳穴处有星月夜风格的脸部彩绘（深蓝色漩涡、黄色星星、新月），真实的湿颜料质感，可见笔触和光泽。
男子身穿深色西装外套，浅米色衬衫，戴着草帽，头部缠着干净的白色绷带，留着浅浅的胡茬，站在女子身后，手持沾有蓝色、黄色、白色、绿色颜料的木制调色板，用细刷为她描绘脸部。
温馨的米色公寓内景，大型圆形纸质吊灯，侧窗透入柔和的日光。
中景特写，50mm 镜头感，浅景深，面部锐利，自然皮肤纹理，温暖电影色彩分级，细微胶片颗粒。
无文字，无标志，无 CGI，解剖结构正确，手部真实。
prompt_en:
Ultra-photoreal cinematic editorial couple portrait, 4:5 portrait. 
Woman in {"woman's dress color" "powder-blue"} vintage dress with puff sleeves, long dark wavy hair, natural makeup, small gold hoop earrings, holding a large bouquet of bright yellow sunflowers. 
Starry Night–inspired face paint on right cheek and temple (deep blue swirls, yellow stars, crescent moon), real wet paint texture with visible brushstrokes and sheen. 
Man in dark blazer, light beige shirt, straw hat, clean white head bandage, light stubble, standing behind her painting her face with a thin brush while holding a wooden palette with blue, yellow, white, green paint smears. 
Cozy cream-colored apartment interior, large round paper ceiling lamp, soft daylight from side window. 
Medium close-up, 50mm look, shallow depth of field, sharp faces, natural skin texture, warm cinematic color grade, subtle film grain. 
No text, no logos, no CGI, correct anatomy, realistic hands.

title: 暗黑哥特塔罗牌
author: @ImperfectEngel
prompt:
根据这张图片，生成一张以我为主角的暗黑哥特式塔罗牌。包含[“AI 艺术家 - Shira”]和[咖啡、系着粉色蝴蝶结的白色蓬松胖猫、笔记本电脑、手机、耳机]作为符号，并搭配忧郁的阴影、精致的哥特式边框和神秘的暗黑奇幻氛围。
> [!NOTE]
> **将 [方括号] 中的文字改为您需要的设定**
prompt_en:
Based on this image, generate a dark gothic tarot card featuring me as the main character. Include symbols such as ["AI Artist - Shira"], coffee, a fluffy white cat with a pink bow, a laptop, a smartphone, and headphones. Incorporate melancholic shadows, an intricate gothic border, and a mysterious dark fantasy atmosphere.  
> [!NOTE]  
> **Replace the text inside [square brackets] with your desired settings**

title: 画风切换方法与种类
author: munou_ac
prompt:
画風の切り替え方法と種類

title: 男孩畅饮可乐的怀旧夏日瞬间
author: Heisenberg

title: 双曝光电影海报设计
author: Shreya Yadav
prompt:
- 海报主题为“双重曝光”技术，展现了一位女性（左侧侧面像）和一位男性（右侧侧面像），两人都背对着对方。
- 两人的轮廓（包括详细的面部特征和头发轮廓）与茂密的森林景观完美融合，形成一种艺术感十足的视觉效果。
- 女性的身体部分呈现出温暖的金色秋色调，而男性的身体部分则被冷色调的蓝色光线照亮。
- 温和的阳光透过树木洒下，为画面增添了层次感、对比度以及情感氛围。
- 光线效果处理得非常自然流畅，背景采用纯黑色。
- 海报整体风格
prompt_en:
Cinematic Double Exposure Poster Design.
Use Google Gemini ai Nano Banana 3 Pro.
{
"prompt": "A cinematic double-exposure portrait featuring a woman in profile on the left and a man in profile on the right, both turned away from each other. Their silhouettes, including detailed facial features and hair outlines, blend seamlessly into a dense forest landscape with an artistic, modern pattern. The woman's side glows with warm golden autumn hues, while the man's side is illuminated by cool, serene blue tones. Soft rays of sunlight filter through the trees, adding depth, contrast, and emotional atmosphere. Smooth, natural lighting transitions and a clean black backdrop. Modern, artistic, emotionally expressive poster aesthetic. Bold title text at the bottom: 'Ai Queen is Here…'.",
"style": [
"cinematic",
"double exposure",
"high-detail",
"artistic poster",
"emotional"
],
"settings": {
"background": "clean black backdrop",
"lighting": "soft sun rays, warm vs cool contrast",
"composition": "woman profile left, man profile right, both facing outward",
"color_palette": {
"woman_side": "warm golden autumn tones",
"man_side": "cool serene blue tones"
}
},
"effects": [
"smooth transitions between silhouettes and forest landscape",
"high contrast artistic glow",
"poster-quality finish"
],
"title_text": "Ai Queen is Here…",
"ratio": "3:4"
}

title: 通过钥匙孔看世界
author: @icreatelife
prompt: 通过[材料]钥匙孔看向神秘的[世界]黑暗幻想，钥匙孔周围[非常黑的背景]，清晰聚焦，摄影
prompt_en: looking through a [MATERIAL] keyhole towards a mythical [WORLD] dark fantasy, [very black background] around keyhole, sharp focus, photographic

title: 高端时尚写真：深绿礼服女性自信姿态全黑背景拍摄
author: Johnn

title: 科幻建筑模型工匠的光影创作场景
author: Gadgetify
prompt:
为 {argument name="structure name" default="死星"} 执行此操作：<instruction>
  1. 语义推理引擎（杰作）：
输入 A 是一个著名建筑、城市或虚构结构（例如：罗马斗兽场、霍格沃茨、死星）。
分析主题以确定其“模型美学”：
   材料：确定主要的建模介质。
   （例如：古代遗迹 -> 石膏/粘土。现代城市 -> 白色泡沫板/亚克力。奇幻 -> 木材/苔藓）。
   蓝图：识别桌上的参考文件。
   （例如：老式羊皮纸地图 vs. 蓝色晒图 vs. 数字 CAD 打印件）。
2. 工作坊：
目标：“电影工匠”肖像。
房间：一个杂乱、高天花板的模型制作工作室。木制架子靠墙排列，上面摆满了“以前的项目”（同类型的其他模型）。
人物：一个受输入启发的制作者角色，穿着相关围裙并戴着合适的遮阳板或防护工具。
桌子：一张伤痕累累的木制工作台，上面摆满了比例模型工具：X-Acto 刻刀、胶水瓶、砂纸块和木屑。
3. 叙事：
姿势：工匠靠近“模型”（输入 A），模型居中放置在桌上。
互动：他正用镊子或手指小心翼翼地将一个微小细节组件放置到结构上。
（例如：种植一棵微型树、放置一面小旗帜或粘贴一个微型人物）。
比例：模型看起来宏伟但微小；相比之下，人手显得巨大而饱经风霜。
4. 灯光与氛围：
灯光：体积光线（丁达尔效应）。一束强烈、单一的温暖阳光从高窗（左上/中央）射入，照亮了漂浮的灰尘颗粒并聚焦在模型上。
对比：工作室的角落处于深影中；工作台面明亮。
调色板：温暖、尘土飞扬的泥土色调（棕色、金色、米色）。
输出：一张图片，16:9 宽高比，电影摄影，“国家地理”美学，体积光。
</instruction>
prompt_en:
Do this for {argument name="structure name" default="Death Star"}: <instruction>
  1. The Semantic Inference Engine (The Masterpiece):  
Input A is a Famous Building, City, or Fictional Structure (e.g., The Colosseum, Hogwarts, The Death Star).
Analyze the subject to determine the   Model Aesthetic  :
   The Material:  Identify the primary modeling medium.
   (e.g., Ancient Ruins -> Plaster/Clay. Modern City -> White Foamcore/Acrylic. Fantasy -> Wood/Moss). 
   The Blueprints:  Identify the reference documents on the table.
   (e.g., Vintage Parchment Maps vs. Blue Cyanotypes vs. Digital CAD printouts). 
2.  The Workshop :
Goal: "Cinematic Artisan" Portrait.
The Room: A cluttered, high-ceilinged Model Maker's Studio. Wooden shelves line the walls, filled with "Previous Projects" (other models in the same genre).
The Character: an input inspired maker character wearing a relevant apron and an appropriate Visor or protective tool
The Table: A scarred wooden workbench covered in scale modeling tools: X-Acto knives, glue bottles, sanding blocks, and sawdust.
3. The Narrative :
The Pose: The craftsman is leaning in close to the "Model" (Input A), which sits centrally on the table.
The Interaction: He is delicately placing a Tiny Detail Component onto the structure using tweezers or his fingers.
(e.g., Planting a miniature tree, placing a tiny flag, or gluing a microscopic figure).
The Scale: The model looks grand but miniature; the human hands look massive and weathered in comparison.
4. Lighting & Atmosphere:
Lighting: Volumetric God Rays (Tyndall Effect). A strong, singular shaft of warm sunlight streams in from a high window (top left/center), illuminating the floating dust particles and spotlighting the model.
Contrast: The workshop corners are in deep shadow; the work surface is bright.
Palette: Warm, dusty Earth Tones (Browns, Golds, Beiges).
Output: ONE image, 16:9 Aspect Ratio, Cinematic Photography, "National Geographic" aesthetic, Volumetric Lighting.
</instruction>

title: 地雷系时尚穿搭参考图
author: ハウルくん💎AI錬金術師
prompt:
**创作一组符合以下时尚概念的写实风格时装参考图片。**该图片将用作未来 generations 中为其他人搭配相同 outfits 的参考。  
- **全身照**：从头部到脚部；  
- **模特**：站立并面向相机；  
- **姿势**：中立，双臂放在身体两侧或稍微离开身体；  
- **穿着**：整套服装必须清晰可见，包括所有配饰和小配件；  
- **比例**：2:3 的竖屏图像；  
- **背景**：优先选择纯白色；如果白色服装会与背景融合，则使用浅灰色或米色的中性背景；  
-
prompt_en:
地雷系（？）作れたｗ
プロンプトって不思議だなぁ〜
👇️このプロンプトでっぽいの出てくる
Create a photorealistic fashion reference image for clothing based on the following fashion concept. This image will be used as a reference to apply the exact same outfit to a different person in future generations.
Full body shot from head to toe, the model standing and facing the camera, neutral pose with arms at sides or slightly away from the body. The full outfit must be clearly visible, including all accessories and small items. Aspect ratio: 2:3 vertical.
Background: clean white preferred; if white clothing blends in, use a simple neutral background in light gray or beige. No distracting patterns or textures.
Face must be completely obscured with heavy mosaic or heavy blur; no recognizable facial features.
Model must match: height 158cm, weight 48kg, measurements B84/W58/H86cm, shoulder width 38cm, body type wave. Preserve long-legs tall-looking proportions: 8-head ratio, leg length about 82cm. Skin fair translucent. Hair slightly wavy straight, below chest, slightly light black.
Fashion concept: Genre jirai-kei. Trend 2024 summer jirai-kei style, black base with purple accents, lace, embroidery, charms, platform shoes, pleated skirt. Silhouette A line, top fitted bottom flared. Color scheme black base with purple accents (lavender, violet) and silver. Country or region style Japan, Tokyo, Shinjuku Kabukicho. Era or decade 2024 summer. Brand inspiration  as aesthetics only with no logos or trademarks.
Create a complete cohesive outfit: top, bottom, optional outerwear, shoes, bag, and accessories. Ensure fabric textures and materials match the concept. Colors must match the specified scheme. Silhouette must match the specified type. Accessories and small items must be clear and detailed.
Photographic quality: photorealistic professional fashion photography, natural or soft studio lighting, sharp focus on clothing details, visible fabric texture, accurate colors.
Constraints: no logos, no monograms, no visible brand names, no readable text, no copyrighted characters, no illustration styles. Negative: logos, monograms, brand names, readable text on clothing, watermarks, copyrighted characters, illustration, anime, cartoon, stylized art, over-smoothed plastic skin, unrealistic body proportions, deformed hands.

title: 人民币微雕艺术特写
author: 两斤
prompt:
{
  "prompt": "主题：真正的中国20元纸币（桂林风景图案）。

【微观材料分析】：该物品的渲染必须完全符合的真实货币纸张的物理特性——使用哑光棉纤维纸，而非有光泽的硬纸板。

【纸张工艺】：karst山景的图案被精细地切割并呈现出浮雕效果。
- **关键厚度**：被切割出的纸张层必须显得极其薄（0.1毫米），脆弱且在光线照射下略微透明。边缘应显示出细微的纤维状撕裂痕迹，而不是整齐的厚切痕迹。
- **印刷纹理**：山景并非纯色，而应由微小的雕刻线条（凹版印刷）和扭纹图案构成。油墨在纸张表面应呈现出轻微凸起的效果。

【场景背景】：一只逼真的小竹筏漂浮在平整的印刷水域上。

【比例参考】：一根具有明显皮肤质感的巨大人类手指按在纸币的边缘。与小竹筏相比，手指显得非常庞大，从而突显出物品的微缩比例。

【摄影要求】：使用微距镜头，采用高对比度照明来展现纸张纤维的纹理。背景模糊，深度景深较小。"
}
prompt_en:
{
"prompt": "Subject: Genuine Chinese 20 Yuan Banknote (Guilin Landscape edition). 

[Macro Material Analysis]: The object must be rendered with the exact physical properties of real currency paper—matte cotton-fiber rag paper, NOT glossy cardboard. 

[Paper Engineering]: The karst mountain scenery is delicately cut and lifted. 
- **Critical Thickness**: The cut-out paper layers must appear razor-thin (0.1mm), fragile, and slightly translucent against the light. Edges should show microscopic fibrous tearing, not clean thick cuts.
- **Printing Texture**: The mountains are NOT solid colors. They must be composed of microscopic engraved lines (intaglio printing) and guilloche patterns. The ink should look slightly raised on the paper surface.

[Scene Context]: A realistic tiny bamboo raft floats on the flat printed water. 

[Scale Reference]: A giant, realistic human finger with distinct skin texture presses the edge of the bill. The finger is huge compared to the tiny raft, emphasizing the miniature scale.

[Photography]: Macro lens, high contrast lighting to show the texture of the paper fibers. Shallow depth of field.",
"negative_prompt": "glossy paper, thick cardboard, plastic texture, toy money, monopoly money, solid color blocks, blurred printing, low resolution, cartoon, thick edges",
"aspect_ratio": "16:9"
}

title: 萌系3D动物角色设计模板
author: ShaHid WaNii

title: 巨脸与海滩剪影的双重曝光艺术照
author: Duet | AI
prompt:
一张电影风格的双重曝光肖像，以上传图片作为精确的面部参考。上半部分是同一位男士高度逼真的特写，他姿态平静，若有所思，略微望向远方，神情柔和而自信。保留了自然的肤色、清晰的面部细节、整洁的胡须纹理和自然的头发蓬松度。

下半部分无缝融入日落海滩场景，同一位男士以全身剪影的形式赤脚站在海岸线上。他面向大海，姿态放松，双手垂在身侧，轻柔的海浪拍打着他的双脚。金色的太阳低垂在地平线上，倒映在湿润的沙滩上，营造出温暖的橙金色调。

平滑的双重曝光过渡，电影级光线，柔和的大气薄雾，浅景深，高真实感，情感丰富且内省的氛围。超高分辨率，专业摄影品质，电影般色调，自然阴影，无扭曲，面部结构无变化。
prompt_en:
A cinematic double-exposure portrait using the uploaded image as the exact facial reference. The upper half features a highly realistic close-up of the same man in a calm, reflective pose, looking slightly toward the horizon with a soft, confident expression. Natural skin tone preserved, sharp facial details, clean beard texture, and natural hair volume.
The lower half blends seamlessly into a sunset beach scene where the same man￼ appears as a full-body silhouette standing barefoot at the shoreline. He faces the ocean with a relaxed posture, hands at his sides, gentle waves touching his feet. The golden sun is low on the horizon, reflecting on wet sand, creating a warm orange-gold color palette.
Smooth double-exposure transition, cinematic lighting, soft atmospheric haze, shallow depth of field, high realism, emotional and introspective mood. Ultra-high resolution, professional photography quality, film-like tones, natural shadows, no distortion, no change in facial structure.

title: 聚焦眼神，探索专注之源
author: underwood
prompt:
- 采用极度特写式的肖像构图。
- 整个画面覆盖着一层磨砂黑色的质感层，眼部的位置有一个水平的长方形镂空区域，使眼睛的原有颜色和清晰度得以呈现；红色对焦框突出了这一效果。
- 适合成人观众。
- 被摄者的眼神直视前方，充满专注力。
- 口型呈中性表情，显得平静。
- 整体氛围严肃而专注。
- 头发呈深棕色，略呈波浪状，前额有几缕散乱的发丝，呈现出编辑级修图效果。
- 上衣和下装的设计简单，没有过多的细节。
- 配饰极为简洁，没有佩戴帽子、珠宝或使用电子设备。
- 摄影采用高级杂志风格：使用复古相机进行拍摄，画面背景为深炭黑色。
- 标题为“Focus”

title: 奢华男士镜前自拍，展现精致穿搭与高端衣帽间氛围
author: Abhishek Singh

title: 末世幸存者穿行废墟之城
author: azed_ai

title: 韩式豪华全席宴席广告视觉设计
author: Willy
prompt:
奢华韩定食（全套正餐）广告，社交媒体动态，4:5 比例。

布局：居中（主菜为主角）+ 环绕（小菜围绕）
方向：放射状排列 - 小菜以不同距离围绕主菜
背景：深色木质餐桌，带有复古纹理，黑色漆器托盘，传统韩式包袱布点缀，散落着细微的金箔

产品：
- 俯拍
- 传统陶瓷器皿（瓮器、白瓷）
- 黄铜筷子和勺子

动态：主菜冒着蒸汽（细微），金色闪光点缀
色调：奢华暗色调 - 黑色/炭灰色基底，搭配温暖的金色和传统白瓷对比
风格：奢华 + 复古混合，传统韩式高级餐饮

纹理细节：
- 清晰可见的木纹
- 老旧漆器的光泽
- 陶瓷釉面的变化
- 编织面料的纹理

字体：品牌名称采用传统书法风格，金色箔片效果，韩文 + 英文

相机：哈苏 X2D，50mm f/3.5，俯拍，暖色钨丝灯 + 柔和补光

签名：时尚手写签名“Willy”优雅地放置在右下角（小写字母）

风格关键词：韩定食，韩式全套正餐，小菜摆盘，传统奢华，传承餐饮。时尚手写签名 Willy 以小写字母优雅地放置在右下角。
prompt_en:
Luxury Korean Hanjeongsik (full course meal) advertisement, SNS feed, 4:5 ratio.

LAYOUT: Centered (main dish as hero) + Orbital (banchan surrounding)
DIRECTION: Radial arrangement - side dishes orbiting main course at varying distances
BACKGROUND: Dark wood table with vintage texture, black lacquer tray, traditional Korean bojagi fabric accent, subtle gold leaf scattered

PRODUCT:
- Overhead shot
- Traditional ceramic vessels (onggi, baekja porcelain)
- Brass chopsticks and spoon

DYNAMIC: Steam rising from main dish (subtle), golden sparkle accents
TONE: Luxury dark - black/charcoal base with warm gold and traditional white porcelain contrast
STYLE: Luxury + Vintage hybrid, traditional Korean fine dining

TEXTURE DETAILS:
- Visible wood grain
- Aged lacquer patina
- Ceramic glaze variations
- Woven fabric texture

TYPOGRAPHY: Brand name in traditional calligraphy style, gold foil effect, Korean + English

CAMERA: Hasselblad X2D, 50mm f/3.5, overhead shot, warm tungsten + soft fill lighting

SIGNATURE: A stylish handwritten signature "Willy" elegantly placed at bottom right corner (small letters)

Style keywords: hanjeongsik, Korean full course, banchan arrangement, traditional luxury, heritage dining. A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner

title: 分身嬉戏少女
author: @hey_m_cherry
prompt: 一张富有创意的超现实图像：一位女子盘坐在地，身穿深黄色连帽卫衣、灰色长裤与黄色鞋子，四周环绕着数个迷你版的自己。多个缩小版人物立于她的手掌、肩头与地面，与“原版”嬉戏互动。背景为干净简洁的浅灰至深灰渐变。光线柔和且具电影感，呈现真实阴影与景深效果。
prompt_en:
A creative surreal image of a woman sitting on the ground, wearing a dark yellow hoodie, gray pants, and yellow shoes, surrounded by several miniature versions of himself.

Multiple smaller versions stand on his hands, shoulders, and around him on the ground, interacting playfully with the larger version.

The background is a clean, simple light gray to dark gray tone.

The lighting is soft and cinematic, with realistic shadows and depth of field.

title: 杂志配有儿童绘画作品
author: @miilesus
